verse_specific_anchors: svadharma — role-specific duty (the operator's specific accumulated context, not generic work)
api — the marker of an independent second argument added to the imperishable doctrine
dharmya yuddha — the dharmic engagement (a hard but legitimate problem already in lane)
kṣatriyasya na vidyate śreyaḥ — for THIS role, this is the highest available good
verdict_reason: The engineering analog anchors specifically on role-specific accumulated context and the api-as-independent-argument framing. The 'three-year ownership of the Postgres write-path' with named role-bound artifacts (idempotency-key contract, fraud-shelf, on-call rota with named-escalation-owner) is uniquely the svadharma-of-this-role analog, not generic 'do your job.' Other verses in the duty block (2.32 unsought-arrival, 2.33 mid-execution-quitting, 2.47 niṣkāma-karma) cannot be substituted: 2.32 is about the moment of arrival, 2.33 is about leaving an already-accepted duty, 2.47 is about disowning the fruits. Only 2.31 names the role-bound-context-as-source-of-duty argument with the api marker. PASS on both 7.6 and 3.5.
